item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Vegetable burrito — spiced, roasted vegetables, rice and beans in a tomato tortilla. With pico de gallo, crème fraîche and jalapeños. (1+6)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Rice stir-fry with plenty of fine vegetables, edamame and egg, topped with spring onion and sesame. With Asian cucumber salad and coriander. (2+7+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: The famous red-lentil dal with intense depth, served with rice, mint raita and mango chutney. (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Creamy orzo “otto” with courgette, spinach and basil. Topped with baked feta, chickpeas and tomato. (1+6)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Crispy falafel with herbed couscous, topped with a fresh Mediterranean tomato salad with mint. Served with baba ghanoush, hummus, tzatziki and pita chips. (1+8+13+15)
